sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n576" key="a)gkule/omai" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀγκῠλέομαι</orth>, <sense id="n576.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">hurl like a javelin,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">Ἔρως κεραυνὸν ἠγκυλημένος</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1660.tlg001:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Satyr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
